name: tuningengines-cli
description: Fine-tune and train open-source LLMs and SLMs with zero infrastructure. Tuning Engines CLI and MCP server for domain-specific model training — own your sovereign AI model, fine-tuned on your data via specialized tuning agents. Supports Qwen, Llama, DeepSeek, Mistral, Gemma, Phi, StarCoder, CodeLlama from 1B to 72B parameters. LoRA, QLoRA, full fine-tuning. Cost estimation, model management, S3 import/export. 18 MCP tools for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible AI assistant.
